data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that some providers work at multiple locations. However, the evidence does not include any specific checks or API interactions that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that Dr. Williams works at multiple locations, there is no concrete evidence or data to confirm that this requirement is satisfied, leading to a clear gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence of provider assignments to multiple locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add provider location assignment validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the provider is assigned to multiple locations.
